## Summary

- Explain the user-facing or maintainer-facing change.

## Validation

- [ ] `yarn lint`
- [ ] `yarn typecheck`
- [ ] `yarn test`
- [ ] `yarn build`
- [ ] `yarn docs:build`
- [ ] `yarn typecheck:public`

## Docs and tests

- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated docs or examples for public changes
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files included

## Notes for reviewers

- Mention any Daraja portal ambiguity, compatibility concern, or follow-up item here.
